name: dentease-ph-mvp
description: Kök betikler — backend ve frontend ayrı klasörlerde.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run test:e2e:pages --prefix frontend && npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend -- e2e/smoke.spec.ts e2e/auth.spec.ts
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:az && npm run verify:e2e
